company.name: ZEBRA TECHNOLOGIES CORP
company.security: Zebra Technologies Corporation - Class A Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: PS 1.91x, operating profit 0.7B, normalized NI proxy 0.14B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is -68.01% YoY, trend declining.
Normalized P/E proxy is 76.52x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 8.4% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
